title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, create, and run Llama-2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, embed, generate completions, pull/create models using the local Ollama server.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; run and chat with local LLMs from Node or browsers (via proxy).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as a local LLM provider for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style); chat history, model management, multi-user, mobile friendly.

title: ollama-cli (sugarforever/ollama-cli)
summary: Interactive terminal UI for Ollama built with Python Prompt Toolkit; browse models, chat, and manage sessions.

title: ollama-copilot (cmiller01/ollama-copilot)
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-rag (ggerganov/ollama-rag)
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example with Ollama, Chroma, and sentence-transformers.

title: ollama4j (ollama4j/ollama4j)
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, fluent builders, Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-discord-bot (dannykansas/ollama-discord-bot)
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using local Ollama models; slash commands, thread support.

title: ollama-helm (thedatabaseme/ollama-helm)
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU support and persistent storage.

title: ollama-gpt (jmorganca/ollama-gpt)
summary: Tiny GPT-style web app (Next.js) that streams completions from Ollama over HTTP.

title: ollama-csharp (awaescher/ollama-csharp)
summary: .NET client library for Ollama with async enumerable streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-haystack (deepset-ai/ollama-haystack)
summary: Haystack integration that uses Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack 2.0 pipelines.

title: ollama-rust (pepperoni21/ollama-rust)
summary: Async Rust client for Ollama; tokio-based, typed requests, CLI binary included.

title: ollama-nvidia-trt (anibali/ollama-nvidia-trt)
summary: Experimental TensorRT-LLM backend for Ollama to accelerate inference on NVIDIA GPUs.

title: ollama-slack-bot (rick-github/ollama-slack-bot)
summary: Slack bot that listens in channels/DM and responds via Ollama; Bolt.js framework, socket mode.

title: ollama-obsidian (joethei/ollama-obsidian)
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for local AI writing assistance and note Q&A.

title: ollama-macOS-menu (fharper/ollama-macOS-menu)
summary: Native macOS menu-bar app to start/stop Ollama server and quickly open logs or web UI.

title: ollama-datasets (mneedham/ollama-datasets)
summary: Curated collection of datasets and notebooks for fine-tuning models that can be imported into Ollama.
